data.title: Donald Trump Slaps Jerome Powell on the Back While Urging for Interest Rate Cuts
data.description:
In a recent public appearance, former President Donald Trump warmly approached Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell and gave him an encouraging slap on the back, all the while advocating for significant cuts to interest rates in order to stimulate economic growth and bolster financial markets.
source: https://blocknews.com/donald-trump-slaps-jerome-powell-on-the-back-while-urging-for-interest-rate-cuts/

data.title: 250,000 Tether Gold tokens in circulation are backed by 7.66 tons of gold, Tether says
data.description:

data.title: Michael Saylor Unveils New Bitcoin Buying Strategy: Here is What You Need to know
data.description:
Michael Saylor, the prominent entrepreneur and co-founder of MicroStrategy, has recently unveiled a groundbreaking strategy for acquiring Bitcoin, which has generated significant interest in the cryptocurrency community and beyond. In this article, we will explore the key components of Saylor's innovative approach, analyze its potential implications for investors and the broader market, and provide essential information you need to understand how this strategy could impact your own investment decisions regarding Bitcoin. Here is everything you need to know about Michael Saylor's new Bitcoin buying strategy and what it might mean for the future of cryptocurrency investment.
source: https://blocknews.com/michael-saylor-unveils-new-bitcoin-buying-strategy-here-is-what-you-need-to-know/

data.title: Jerome Powell calls Trump a liar in front of reporters during Fed tour
data.description:
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell called President Donald Trump a liar to his face on Thursday during a public appearance at the Fed’s Washington headquarters, after Trump claimed the cost of renovations had blown past $3. 1 billion. Standing side by side in white hard hats, Powell told reporters, “That’s not true. I haven’t heard that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powell-calls-trump-a-liar-during-fed-tour/

data.title: TRUMP Token Lands on TRON – Cross-Chain Power Meets Scale
data.description:
The TRUMP Token has officially made its debut on the TRON blockchain, marking a significant milestone in the world of digital currencies. This innovative development seamlessly combines cross-chain capabilities with substantial scalability, opening up new opportunities for users and investors alike. As the TRUMP Token integrates with TRON's robust infrastructure, it enhances its accessibility and functionality, paving the way for a more dynamic and interconnected cryptocurrency ecosystem. With this launch, the potential for growth and collaboration across different blockchains is greater than ever, setting the stage for a new era of decentralized finance and digital assets.
source: https://blocknews.com/trump-token-lands-on-tron-cross-chain-power-meets-scale/

data.title: TON Foundation launches Toncoin treasury company, plans to raise $400M
data.description:
The TON Foundation has announced plans to partner with Kingsway Capital Partners to create a new Toncoin treasury company. The joint entity is set to raise up to $400 million to advance the company’s Toncoin treasury operations. According to reports, the entity will treat TON as a core financial reserve, mirroring strategies seen in other […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ton-foundation-launches-toncoin-treasury/
